3316860.name: Flag Builder Studio
3316860.description:
Flag Builder Studio provides you with easy-to-use, intuitive tools to create and export unique flags.

While the interface of Flag Builder Studio is simple, the application allows for the creation of countless flag shapes and color combinations. You can export your finished design as either a PNG image or an SVG vector file.

Vexillology is a study of the science and beauty of flags. Flag Builder Studio offers you the chance to explore your creativity by making your favorite flags, whether real or imaginary. Whether for illustration, world-building, simple curiosity, or preparing to hoist a never-before-seen flag in real life, Flag Builder Studio is the tool for you.

Currently Flag Builder Studio is in Early Access. It's functionality will be expanded with time.

Users of Flag Builder Studio are welcome to use their created flags however they wish, including for commercial purposes.
